amendment.description: In the nature of a substitute.

vote.text: Amendment SA 4790 agreed to in Senate by Voice Vote.

action.text: Amendment SA 4790 proposed by Senator Thune. (consideration: CR S1660) In the nature of a substitute.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4790 proposed by Senator Thune.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 4790 agreed to in Senate by Voice Vote.
